name: HOMAG Group AG
summary: HOMAG Group AG manufactures and sells machines and equipment for the wood-processing industry worldwide. The company offers machines for storage system, cutting, sizing and edge banding, planning and moulding, drilling and fitting insertion, assembly, packaging, automation, and house construction applications, as well as buffer and collating, sanding machines, and lacquering and laminating. It also provides CNC routers for sawing, routing, drilling, separating, measuring, and 3D processing applications. In addition, the company develops and sells software; and life cycle services, field services, remote services, spare part services, training, consulting, and financial services. HOMAG Group AG was founded in 1960 and is based in Schopfloch, Germany. HOMAG Group AG is a subsidiary of D√É¬ºrr Technologies GmbH.
